prs.title: feat: add allowBuildsOfTrustedDeps setting (true by default)
fix(auth-header): decode _password from base64 for default registry auth
fix(exe): hardlink binary as extensionless file on Windows
chore: update pnpm-lock.yaml
perf(importer): skip staging directory and write package.json as completion marker
perf(cafs): skip rename on cold CAS writes, use atomic rename for recovery
fix(cafs): update locker cache when file exists with correct integrity
perf(cafs): optimize hot path string operations
fix(workspace): treat catalog refs in workspace overrides as used during cleanupUnusedCatalogs
fix: resolve patch file paths during pnpm fetch
fix: handle non-native Error throws in requirePnpmfile
feat: add dedupePeers option to reduce peer dependency duplication
feat: add dedupePeers option to reduce peer dependency duplication
docs: fix duplicated word in DirPatcher comment
perf: skip redundant GVS internal linking on warm reinstall
refactor: replace onlyBuiltDependencies and ignoredBuiltDependencies with allowBuilds
refactor: rename directories and unify command packages per domain
feat: add pnpm peers check command
refactor: add recursiveByDefault property to CommandDefinition
fix: use ENOENT check instead of which.sync for command-not-found on Windows
docs: add PR conflict resolution guide and helper script
feat: implement native recursive version command
fix(link-bins): apply bin ownership overrides in conflict resolution
feat: add pn and pnx short aliases
chore: compile pnpm CLI bundle before tests that use it
fix: propagate error cause when throwing `PnpmError` in `@pnpm/npm-resolver`
feat: store prune displays the total size of removed files
fix: `clearCache` function in `@pnpm/resolving.npm-resolver`
fix: invalid specifiers for peers on all non-exact version selectors
refactor: remove hardcoded runtime bin workaround from linker
chore(typescript): make typecheck threading configurable
feat: warn when optimistic-repeat-install skips shouldRefreshResolution hooks
test: use `resolution-mode=highest` in tests
fix: handle non-string version selectors in hoistPeers
refactor: prefix internal scripts with . to hide them
fix: check allowBuild for packages with cached side-effects
fix: update GVS symlinks after approve-builds by running install
test: wait for Verdaccio to come online before running tests to fix persistent flakes
fix: store global binaries in PNPM_HOME/bin subdirectory
feat: support hidden scripts starting with '.'
feat(approve-builds): positional args, !pkg deny syntax, and auto-populate allowBuilds
docs(contributing): fix commit message line-length wording
refactor: remove unused @pnpm/fs.msgpack-file package and lockfile-directory setting
chore: update all dependencies to latest versions
fix: default to ['.'] for workspacePackagePatterns when packages field is missing
chore: remove npm_config_verify_deps_before_run from extraEnv
feat!: stop falling back to npm CLI for unimplemented commands
feat(ci): implement pnpm ci command
fix: reuse sortLockfileKeys for env lockfile sorting
docs: fix --force help text grammar
build: use `stripTypeScriptTypes` transform mode for source map support
chore: reduce noisy warnings in test output
refactor: merge @pnpm/fs.find-packages into @pnpm/workspace.projects-reader
feat(publish): handle OTP and web-based authentication flows
feat: auto-start Claude to review PRs in wt.fish
chore: add .devcontainer for GitHub Codespaces
refactor: rename deps-resolver and env-installer packages
feat: remove misleading `npm-notice`
feat!: stop reading settings from the pnpm field of package.json
refactor: rename workspace functions from packages to projects
refactor: rename packages and consolidate runtime resolvers
refactor: rename internal packages to @pnpm/<domain>.<leaf> convention
feat(sbom): add pnpm sbom command
refactor: reorganize monorepo domain structure
chore: fix pnpm audit fix update command in changelog
fix: fail incompatible lockfile in frozen CI mode
fix(core): improve no-TTY modules purge hint
fix: handle dangling symlink when linking node binary
feat: add virtualStoreOnly option to skip post-import linking
fix: add package.json to linkExePlatformBinary test fixtures
fix: resolve @pnpm/exe platform binary in symlinked node_modules layout
fix: resolve config dependencies from pnpm-workspace.yaml during install
feat(approve-builds): add --all flag to skip interactive prompts
refactor: merge env lockfile into pnpm-lock.yaml
fix: use devEngines.runtime node version for engine checks
chore: upgrade cspell
test: fix another isRepoPublic flaky test
fix: incorrect depPath format used in time pruning
ci: only run Windows tests with lowest Node.js on branches
ci: run Linux/Node 24 tests first, then the rest of the matrix
test: cover error cases and improve polling resilience
fix: correctly identify workspace packages in all operations
fix(outdated): handle NO_MATCHING_VERSION when minimumReleaseAge is set
refactor: simplify OTP enquirer interface and type casting
fix: pnpm list --only-projects regression (fixes #10651)
chore: add script to clean up worktrees with merged PRs
fix: set up remote tracking for fork PRs in worktree helper
fix: handle verifyDepsBeforeRun prompt in non-TTY environments
refactor: improve type safety for `publish` function cast
refactor: destructure `context`
style: enforce node: protocol for builtin imports
style: add eslint-plugin-simple-import-sort
refactor: synchronous `generateQrCode`
feat(audit): add fix update mode
feat(publish): specifying `npm-auth-type` and handle `npm-notice`
fix: handle 400 responses as HTTP errors in npm resolver fetch
fix: detect global bin conflicts between pnpm and @pnpm/exe
fix(sbom): suppress reporter to prevent warnings from polluting stdout
fix(dlx): fix race conditions in parallel dlx calls sharing Global Virtual Store
feat: add worktree helper script and shell functions
chore: add Husky hooks to prevent Claude Code from bad git practices
fix: don't run pnpm install in the fixture dir, use a temp copy instead
fix: restore default workspace package patterns when packages field is missing
feat: support `devEngines.packageManager` for pnpm version management
feat(audit): audit dependencies from `pnpm-lock.env.yaml`
feat: print QR code alongside auth URL during webauth OTP flow
chore: update zkochan packages to latest versions
fix: `filter` on `pnpm-workspace.yaml`
feat: store config deps and package manager integrities in pnpm-lock.env.yaml
chore: fix after-install warning typo
refactor: consolidate build-related packages into building/ domain
refactor: extract rebuild implementation into @pnpm/building.after-install
refactor: simplify patchedDependencies lockfile format
feat: install config dependencies into the global virtual store
test: strip ANSI before assertions in outdated and formatError (same brittleness as list)
build: enable @typescript-eslint/no-import-type-side-effects
V10 update
fix: show linked path instead of ??? in global install output
fix: fix mount-modules test when fuse-native is not installed
fix: improve global install output to show clean summary
fix: race condition with global-virtual store
fix(gvs): engine-agnostic hashes and build failure recovery
feat: use JSON for npm registry metadata cache instead of msgpack
feat: use SQLite for storing package index in the content-addressable store
build: enable TypeScript `verbatimModuleSyntax` compiler option
fix: resolve relative path params in global add against CWD
feat: allow global install to override bins owned by the new package
test: replace sinon with built-in jest spying across the repo
feat: preserve comments when updating `pnpm-workspace.yaml`
test: fix additional isRepoPublic flaky tests
test(fetch): verify pnpm fetch populates global virtual store links/
fix(tests): pin real npm packages to prevent moving target test failures
fix(config): respect explicit enableGlobalVirtualStore in CI environments
feat!: replace `npm publish` with `libnpmpublish`
docs: fix duplicated word in DirPatcher comment
feat: use global virtual store for global packages and dlx
feat: add `pnpm runtime set` command and deprecate `pnpm env use`
feat!: change default values of optimisticRepeatInstall and verifyDepsBeforeRun
fix: prefer .pnpmfile.mjs by default
feat(cli): add -F short alias for --filter
fix(store): include devDependencies in bundled manifest
feat: isolated global packages
feat: add `pnpm clean` command for safe `node_modules`/lockfile removal
fix(patch): use '/dev/null' instead of os.devNull for GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL
fix(dlx): print help message when no arguments are provided
fix(npm-resolver): respect version constraints when falling back to workspace packages
fix: use headless install for injected self-referencing file: dependencies
fix(patch): prevent git config path errors in patch-commit
fix: comparison of hoistPattern values
fix: skip re-importing packages when global virtual store is warm
fix(dependencies-hierarchy): handle undefined `pkgSnapshot` in `pnpm why -r`
fix(config): respect lockfile: false setting from pnpm-workspace.yaml
fix: run @pnpm/exe setup script in-process to fix version switching without Node.js
fix: pnpm why -r --parseable
ci: skip update-lockfile on forks
chore: update pnpm-lock.yaml
fix(shell-completion): give correct suggestions when command line ends with a space
fix: update npm-packlist
fix(lockfile): respect lockfile-include-tarball-url=false for non-standard URLs
fix(link-bins): hardlink node.exe on Windows instead of creating a cmd-shim
feat: improve error message for versions not meeting minimumReleaseAge
refactor: remove last mentions of use-node-version
fix(link-bins): stop prepending redundant paths to NODE_PATH in command shims
fix: respect peer dep range in hoistPeers when preferred versions exist
refactor(env): unify node version specifier parsing into parseNodeSpecifier in node.resolver
feat: replace pkg with Node.js SEA for standalone executables
refactor(env): `pnpm env` use now delegates to `pnpm add --global`
feat: add musl support to node runtime
test: fix several flaky tests in pkg-manager
fix: audit
ci: run all tests if pnpm-workspace.yaml changes
fix: detect overrides and other lockfile-affecting setting changes in optimisticRepeatInstall
fix(audit): help text for --ignore-registry-errors was missing a "not"
fix(audit): fallback to quick audit endpoint
chore: update pnpm-lock.yaml
fix: retry existence check in global virtual store race condition handler
fix: show warning instead of crashing when running on Node.js 20
feat: support package.yaml and package.json5
perf: save the bundled manifest in the index file
chore: add benchmark script for comparing install performance against main
feat: add nameFormatter option to buildDependentsTree for custom display names
fix: remove misleading `maxAge` argument to `pMemoize`
feat: add `--depth` option to `pnpm why` to limit display depth
feat: reverse `pnpm why` tree and improve `list`/`why` output
build: rework bundled `dist/node_modules`
refactor: simplify dependenciesHierarchyForPackage by delegating to getTree
perf: share dependency graph and materialization cache across importers in list/why
feat: add support for catalogs with dlx
